name: Chilla Puri
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Flour, whole wheat or all-purpose
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and salt together in a bowl.
2. Gradually pour water into the mixture and mix well until smooth. Let it rest for 20 minutes.
3. Beat again and stir in onion, chili, and coriander leaves. Mix well.
4. Heat a griddle with a teaspoon of ghee or oil.
5. Pour about 2 tablespoons of batter onto the griddle to form a round circle measuring approximately 10 cm in diameter.
6. Turn once and cook on the other side until both sides are light brown. Add more ghee if needed.
7. Repeat with the remaining batter.
8. Serve hot with mint chutney or pickle.
